Off Calendar Nov-14-2025 Continued To Mar-10-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion And Notice Of Hearing Of Attorney Fees (Motions)
Off Calendar Nov-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Donald Mahnke, Esq. 650-759-3399 Quill & Arrow LLP for Plaintiff.
Jody Bryant, Esq. 213-624-2500 Squire Patton Boggs LLP for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice to contest the TR was received from Plaintiff.

ARGUED. Both sides present arguments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LUKASZ MAZIARZ' Motion And Notice Of Hearing Of Attorney Fees.

Plaintiff's motion for attorney's fees and expenses is DENIED.

(see word minutes for details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Motion To Enforce Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VOLKSWAGEN GROUP OF AMERICA, INC.'s Motion To Enforce Settlement.

Defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc's Motion To Enforce Settlement is OFF CALENDAR,

By this motion, Defendant seeks an order dismissing the action under the settlement. Dismissal of the action under the settlement, however, is a matter before Department 610. (See Order to Show Cause, June 4, 2025; Order to Show Cause, Aug. 28, 2025.) This department will not interfere in those proceedings

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
